theme: Learn the jam law from light traffic only
title: Merge-Junction Delay: Learn the Jam Law from Light Traffic Only
strategies: constant baseline: predict the mean training delay (ignores load entirely)

multi-linear recipe: ordinary least-squares y = c0 + c1*x0 + c2*x1 + c3*x2; uses all three flows but assumes an additive LINEAR effect, so it misses the shared superlinear exponent and under-predicts heavy-traffic delay

structural recovery: log-log reformulation -- for each candidate coupling-weight pair (w1,w2), log(y) vs log(x0+w1*x1+w2*x2) is an ordinary (well-conditioned) linear regression whose slope IS the shared exponent k; grid-search only has to find (w1,w2), the exponent and scale drop out in closed form
invalid: emit a disallowed token (attribute access / unknown name)
